title: this is every Eva fans dream girl
display_title: this is every Eva fans dream girl
wikitext:
[]: this is every Eva fan's dream girl             Quote Post by Otaprince » Wed Dec 01, 2004 2:06 am [link removed] this chick makes her own Eva clothes and bag, rocks Misato's cross proudly, sports a Misato keychain and NERV wallet... what's not to love?

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Dec 01, 2004 2:30 am She is cool

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Wed Dec 01, 2004 2:43 am She is Ãœber-cool.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Dec 01, 2004 2:39 pm Damn it! When is a Rei Fan going to do that! $hit!

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Dec 01, 2004 4:32 pm :shock: Very interesting. The girl definitely has talent though.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Dec 01, 2004 5:40 pm The shirts are nothing to come over.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Dec 01, 2004 5:46 pm If anyone ever needs a negitive reply just go to Hex LoL.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Dec 01, 2004 6:19 pm She's got nothing on me.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Dec 01, 2004 6:23 pm What? It's true!!! "Neon Genesis Evangelion"--wow, my mind is blown; it must've taken weeks to finish that design. Oh, sorry, it says "Unit 02" on the sleeves. So, she's actually extremely creative, and I would kill anyone in my way to have a shirt with white text all over it. God knows it's impossible to do that.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Dec 01, 2004 6:47 pm See what did i tell yeah

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Wed Dec 01, 2004 7:13 pm Yeah, man. It's the thought that counts.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Dec 01, 2004 8:12 pm Hunter21 wrote: :shock: Very interesting. The girl definitely has talent though.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Wed Dec 01, 2004 8:28 pm Mmmm... I agree with Hexon. The shirt's not really anything to go crazy over. It doesn't really look like that much time and effort went into making that shirt. For Christ's sake, it's a black shirt with "Neon Genesis Evangelion" text ironed on it. Same for the messenger bag. I could make a shirt ten times better than that. If you wanna see something really cool, check this out: [url]http://www.alohavintage.com/aug212003n119.JPG[/url] The design also comes on a tank top, a t-shirt, and a wrap skirt. I'm seriously thinking about getting the skirt for when I go on my cruise this Christmas.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Dec 01, 2004 8:42 pm Not bad

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Wed Dec 01, 2004 10:48 pm i notice that only the ladies have been negative about this post. Jealous of other Eva-girls, perhaps? [runs for cover] :)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Dec 01, 2004 11:48 pm When I get the time, I'm going to make a shirt from one of these images. And it will be teh awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Dec 02, 2004 12:49 am The Eva Monkey wrote: When I get the time, I'm going to make a shirt from one of these images. And it will be teh awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Thu Dec 02, 2004 12:53 am trying to defuse the situation, eh Eva Monkey? I hereby declare the Eva Monkey Forum T-shirt Design Contest!

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Dec 02, 2004 12:59 am Otaprince wrote: trying to defuse the situation, eh Eva Monkey? I hereby declare the Eva Monkey Forum T-shirt Design Contest!

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Dec 02, 2004 9:55 am eh? the shirt from the original isnt that amazing...you can buy some of that stuff, like the wallet and whatnot... Ayanami did a pretty good job...you made it yourself? and that last t-shirt...soooo OOC...Shinji? come on...
